'''yagogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zein|zein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zein|zein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yagogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yægegeth|yægegeth]] || [[word:yægegej|yægegej]] || [[word:yægegesh|yægegesh]] || [[word:yægege|yægege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yagogogoth|yagogogoth]] || [[word:yagogogoj|yagogogoj]] || [[word:yagogogosh|yagogogosh]] || [[word:yagogogo|yagogogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yagogoth|yagogoth]] || [[word:yagogoj|yagogoj]] || [[word:yagogosh|yagogosh]] || [[word:yagogo|yagogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yagofgofth|yagofgofth]] || [[word:yagofgofj|yagofgofj]] || [[word:yagofgofsh|yagofgofsh]] || [[word:yagofgof|yagofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yagogotho|yagogotho]] || [[word:yagogojo|yagogojo]] || [[word:yagogosho|yagogosho]] || [[word:yagogoko|yagogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yagogoth|yagogoth]] || [[word:yagogoj|yagogoj]] || [[word:yagogosh|yagogosh]] || [[word:yagogo|yagogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yagogothol|yagogothol]] || [[word:yagogojol|yagogojol]] || [[word:yagogoshol|yagogoshol]] || [[word:yagogokol|yagogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yagogoothotho|yagogoothotho]] || [[word:yagogoojojo|yagogoojojo]] || [[word:yagogooshosho|yagogooshosho]] || [[word:yagogooko|yagogooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yagogothon|yagogothon]] || [[word:yagogojon|yagogojon]] || [[word:yagogoshon|yagogoshon]] || [[word:yagogokon|yagogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yagogothooro|yagogothooro]] || [[word:yagogojooro|yagogojooro]] || [[word:yagogoshooro|yagogoshooro]] || [[word:yagogokooro|yagogokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
